items.title: Dimensionality reduction and PCA
items.description: SVD of centered data yields principal components and explained variance without explicitly computing the covariance matrix.

items.title: Recommender systems and matrix factorization
items.description: Low-rank SVD-style factorizations learn user and item embeddings from sparse interaction matrices.

items.title: Stable least squares and pseudoinverse
items.description: SVD computes the Moore–Penrose pseudoinverse A⁺, giving minimum-norm least-squares solutions even when A is rank-deficient.

items.title: Compression and denoising
items.description: Truncated SVD keeps dominant structure in images, text-term matrices and activations while discarding small singular values often associated with noise.
